creator: newton.ja.terry@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Joe B from comment #3)

> pcm0:mixer: <Intel Kaby Lake (HDMI/DP 8ch)> on hdaa0 (play) (default)

HDMI sound on Intel Kaby Lake is known not to work:

Unable to make HDMI sound works with HD630, PR reported 2019-04-17:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=237340

No sound over HDMI, issue opened Jul 4, 2022:
https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/issues/187
